intent.title: Week 1
intent.text: 5/10–5/16. Establishing positions and baseline loads across all days.

exercises.name: High Hang Clean (3s pause hold) + Mid Hang Clean (3s pause) + Clean (3s pause catch)
exercises.note: Each rep from a different position

exercises.name: 2 Snatch Grip Push Press + 2 Snatch Balance
Snatch High Pull + Low Hang Snatch High Pull + Tempo (5–7s) Snatch

intent.title: Week 2
intent.text: 5/17–5/23. Loading increases. Multi-rep positional variations on Monday.

exercises.name: High Hang Clean (3s) + Mid Hang Clean (3s) + Clean (3s catch)
2 Snatch Grip Push Press + 2 Snatch Balance
Snatch High Pull + Low Hang Snatch High Pull + Tempo Snatch

intent.title: Week 3
intent.text: 5/24–5/30. Peak loading week. Three-rep buildups on snatch and clean variations.

exercises.name: High Hang Clean (3s) + Mid Hang Clean (3s) + Clean (3s catch)
2 Snatch Grip Push Press + 2 Snatch Balance
Snatch High Pull + Low Hang Snatch High Pull + Tempo Snatch

intent.title: Week 4
intent.text: 5/31–6/6. Deload / transition week. Drop volume, keep intensity moderate.

exercises.name: High Hang Clean (3s) + Mid Hang Clean (3s) + Clean (3s catch)
2 Snatch Grip Push Press + 2 Snatch Balance
Snatch High Pull + Low Hang Snatch High Pull + Tempo Snatch

intent.title: Week 5
intent.text: 3/15–3/21. Deficit work on snatch. Pause jerk complexes introduced.

exercises.name: Clean w/ 2s Pause at Knee + 3s Lower into Mid Hang Clean High Pull + Clean & Jerk
Split Jerk w/ 3s Pause in Dip + Split Jerk w/ 3s Pause in Catch
Halting Snatch + Power Snatch + Overhead Squat
Clean (3 knee to hip pull, then hang clean)

intent.title: Week 6
intent.text: 3/22–3/28. Building intensity on jerk pause complex and front squat.

exercises.name: Clean w/ 2s Pause at Knee + Clean & Jerk
Split Jerk w/ 3s Pause in Dip + Split Jerk w/ 3s Pause in Catch
Halting Snatch + Power Snatch + Overhead Squat
Clean (3 knee to hip pull, then hang clean)

intent.title: Week 7
intent.text: 3/29–4/4. Peak loading week of meso 2. Highest volume on all primary lifts.

exercises.name: Clean w/ 2s Pause at Knee + Clean & Jerk
Split Jerk w/ 3s Pause in Dip + Split Jerk w/ 3s Pause in Catch
Halting Snatch + Power Snatch + Overhead Squat
Clean (3 knee to hip pull, then hang clean)

intent.title: Week 8
intent.text: 4/5–4/11. Deload / transition. Reduce volume, maintain intensity. Prep for meso 3.

exercises.name: Clean w/ 2s Pause at Knee + Clean & Jerk
Split Jerk w/ 3s Pause in Dip + Split Jerk w/ 3s Pause in Catch
Halting Snatch + Power Snatch + Overhead Squat
Clean (3 knee to hip pull, then hang clean)

intent.title: Week 9
intent.text: 4/12–4/18. Competition lifts dominate. Wave loading on C&J and snatch. RM front squat work begins.

exercises.name: Mid Hang Snatch (drop bar between reps)
Clean & Jerk (wave loading)
exercises.note: Each triplet builds within the wave

days.label: WEDNESDAY
days.focus: Snatch Waves + Clean + Jerk + Back Squat

intent.title: Week 10
intent.text: 4/19–4/25. Intensity climbing. Wave loading progresses. RM squats continue.

exercises.name: Mid Hang Snatch (drop bar between reps)

days.label: WEDNESDAY
days.focus: Snatch Waves + Clean + Jerk + Back Squat

intent.title: Week 11
intent.text: 4/26–5/2. Peak intensity. Heaviest wave loading. 2RM squats.

exercises.name: Mid Hang Snatch (drop bar between reps)

days.label: WEDNESDAY
days.focus: Snatch Waves + Clean + Jerk + Back Squat

intent.title: Week 12 · OLY TOTAL 🏆
intent.text: 5/3–5/9. Max out week. Hit new 1RMs on snatch and C&J. Establish your Olympic Total. Back squat 1RM on Saturday.

exercises.name: Snatch (opener feel)
exercises.note: Easy. Just stay sharp. No grinding.

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.note: Build to max. Then go home.
